<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Person | Name=Jennifer Pankratz | Guid=3040-193137 | Deck=Jennifer Pankratz is a German game developer, game designer and story writer | Gender=Non-Binary | Birthday=1983-02-28 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Cralon,Games/ELEX,Games/ELEX_II,Games/Risen,Games/Risen_2_Dark_Waters,Games/Risen_3_Titan_Lords | Locations= | Objects= | People=People/Bjorn_Pankratz | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/161/1613774/3743463-3741905404-98749.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3743463-3741905404-98749.jpg","path":"161\/1613774\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Jennifer Pankratz, born Gartmann on February 28, 1983, is a German game developer, game designer and story writer. She is known for her work as a game designer and story writer for the development studio [https://www.mobygames.com/company/2010/piranha-bytes-gmbh Piranha Bytes] ,where she played a key role in the development of the Risen and ELEX series of computer games. In addition, she also had a significant role in the areas of PR and social media. In july 2024, she and her husband [https://www.mobygames.com/person/37826/bjorn-pankratz Björn Pankratz] founded the Indie Game Studio Pithead Studio.
